name: Organic Bananas
description: Bananas are nutritious and delicious. Rich in potassium and natural sugars, they provide quick energy and are great for heart health. Our organic bananas are grown without pesticides.

name: Naturel Red Apple
description: Apples Are Nutritious. Apples May Be Good For Weight Loss. Apples May Be Good For Your Heart. As Part Of A Healthful And Varied Diet.

name: Bell Pepper Red
description: Red bell peppers are loaded with vitamins and antioxidants. They are an excellent source of vitamin C and vitamin A. Perfect for salads, stir-fries, and roasting.

name: Ginger
description: Fresh ginger root with a strong aromatic flavour. Perfect for cooking, baking, and making tea. Helps with digestion and has natural anti-inflammatory properties.

name: Organic Bananas
description: Bulk pack of organic bananas. Perfect for large families or batch smoothie prep. Rich in potassium and natural sugars for quick energy.

name: Fresh Broccoli
description: Crisp fresh broccoli, packed with vitamins K and C, folate, and fibre. A versatile vegetable great for stir-frying, steaming, or eating raw in salads.

name: Avocado
description: Creamy ripe avocados loaded with heart-healthy monounsaturated fats. Perfect for guacamole, toast, salads, and smoothies.

name: Baby Spinach
description: Tender baby spinach leaves, pre-washed and ready to eat. Rich in iron, folate, and vitamins A and C. Great for salads, smoothies, and cooking.

name: Fresh Tomato
description: Ripe, juicy fresh tomatoes with vibrant flavour. Excellent source of vitamin C and lycopene. Perfect for salads, sauces, and cooking.

name: Green Capsicum
description: Crunchy green capsicums with a mild, slightly bitter flavour. Perfect for stir-fries, stuffed dishes, salads, and grilling.

name: Beef Bone
description: Fresh beef bones, ideal for making rich, nutritious broths and soups. High in collagen, minerals, and natural marrow for deep flavour.

name: Broiler Chicken
description: Fresh farm-raised broiler chicken, hygienically processed and vacuum-packed. Great source of lean protein for everyday cooking.

name: Salmon Fillet
description: Premium fresh salmon fillet, rich in omega-3 fatty acids and high-quality protein. Lightly seasoned or enjoyed plain — versatile for grilling, baking, or pan-frying.

name: Lamb Chops
description: Tender and juicy lamb chops from premium cuts. Perfect for grilling, pan-searing, or braising. Rich, distinctive flavour that elevates any meal.

name: Tilapia Fish
description: Fresh whole tilapia fish, cleaned and ready to cook. A popular, affordable fish with mild white flesh. Great for frying, currying, or baking.

name: Egg Chicken Red
description: Fresh free-range chicken eggs with rich, deep-orange yolks. Sourced from hens raised on natural feed. High in protein and essential nutrients.

name: Egg Chicken White
description: Fresh white chicken eggs, perfect for baking, frying, and boiling. High in protein and low in calories. A daily kitchen essential.

name: Fresh Whole Milk
description: Rich, creamy full-fat whole milk from grass-fed cows. Pasteurised for safety with all natural goodness retained. Perfect for drinking, cooking, and baking.

name: Greek Yogurt
description: Thick and creamy Greek yogurt with a rich tangy flavour. Packed with protein and probiotics. Enjoy with fruit, granola, or use in cooking and marinades.

name: Cheddar Cheese
description: Mature cheddar cheese with a rich, sharp flavour. Made from 100% cow's milk. Perfect for sandwiches, burgers, pasta bakes, and cheese boards.

name: Unsalted Butter
description: Premium unsalted butter churned from fresh cream. A baking essential for cakes, cookies, and pastries. Rich, natural flavour with no added salt.

name: Diet Coke
description: The classic zero-sugar refreshment. Crisp, clean taste with no calories. Enjoy ice-cold straight from the can for the ultimate refreshment.

name: Sprite Can
description: Crisp lemon-lime flavoured soda with a refreshing bite. No caffeine, always refreshing. Perfect on its own or as a mixer.

name: Apple & Grape Juice
description: Premium blend of freshly pressed apple and red grape juice. No added sugar, no preservatives, no artificial colours. 100% pure natural goodness.

name: Orange Juice
description: 100% pure squeezed orange juice with no added sugar or preservatives. Packed with vitamin C and natural antioxidants. Refreshing and healthy.

name: Coca Cola Can
description: The original and iconic Coca-Cola in a classic can. A refreshing blend of sweetness and carbonation enjoyed by generations worldwide. Best served cold.

name: Pepsi Can
description: Bold, refreshing Pepsi cola with its unique crisp taste. The perfect companion for meals, snacks, and celebrations. Enjoy ice-cold.

name: Mango Juice
description: Sweet and tropical mango juice made from ripe Bangladeshi mangoes. Rich in vitamin A and C. Refreshing chilled or served over ice.

name: Egg Pasta
description: Premium egg pasta made from durum wheat semolina and fresh eggs. Classic al dente texture. Perfect for bolognese, carbonara, and all pasta sauces.

name: Egg Noodles
description: Instant egg noodles with a savory seasoning pack. Quick and satisfying — ready in just 3 minutes. Popular snack or light meal for the whole family.

name: Mayonnais Eggless
description: Creamy, smooth eggless mayonnaise — vegan-friendly and delicious. Perfect spread for sandwiches, wraps, and rolls, or as a dip for fries and veggies.

name: Digestive Biscuits
description: Classic wholemeal digestive biscuits with a light, crunchy texture and subtly sweet flavour. Perfect with tea, coffee, or as a snack on the go.

name: Potato Chips
description: Crispy, golden potato chips seasoned with just the right amount of salt. The ultimate snack for any occasion — movie nights, parties, or everyday munching.

name: Pure Sunflower Oil
description: Light and neutral sunflower oil, ideal for frying, sautéing, and baking. Rich in vitamin E and low in saturated fats. A healthy everyday cooking oil.

name: Extra Virgin Olive Oil
description: Cold-pressed extra virgin olive oil with a rich, fruity flavour and low acidity. Perfect for drizzling on salads, dipping with bread, or finishing dishes.

name: Pure Desi Ghee
description: Traditionally churned pure desi ghee made from cow's milk. Aromatic, flavourful, and rich. Ideal for cooking, tempering spices, and spreading on roti.

name: Mustard Oil
description: Pungent and flavourful mustard oil, a staple in South Asian cooking. Used for pickling, marinating, and frying. Adds a distinctive, bold taste to every dish.

name: Corn Flakes
description: Light, crispy corn flakes for a quick and delicious breakfast. Fortified with iron and B vitamins. Great with cold milk or as a yogurt topping.

name: Rolled Oats
description: Wholesome rolled oats from whole grain oat groats. High in soluble fibre and beta-glucan for heart health. Versatile for porridge, granola, and baking.

name: Whole Wheat Flour
description: Stone-ground whole wheat flour with the natural bran and germ retained. Higher in fibre and nutrients than refined flour. Perfect for bread, roti, and baking.

name: Brown Rice
description: Premium whole-grain brown rice with the nutritious bran layer intact. Higher in fibre, vitamins, and minerals than white rice. Nutty flavour with a chewy texture.

name: Red Lentils
description: Split red lentils (masoor dal) — a staple of South Asian cuisine. Quick-cooking, high in plant protein and iron. Perfect for dal, soups, and stews.

name: Chickpeas
description: Dried chickpeas (kabuli chana) with a firm, nutty texture when cooked. Excellent source of plant protein and dietary fibre. Perfect for curries, hummus, and salads.

name: Black Beans
description: Hearty black beans with a rich, earthy flavour and creamy texture when cooked. High in protein, fibre, and folate. Great for soups, burritos, rice dishes, and salads.

name: Green Peas
description: Dried green peas with a sweet, mild flavour. Versatile and nutritious — use in soups, curries, stir-fries, or as a side dish. Good source of plant protein and fibre.
